dataset_refs.name: proteus-hneurons-qa
dataset_refs.split: by qid, disjoint files (train/held-out share no question id); 18 models

seed_policy.n_justification: k=5 seeds, power-justified: to detect a balanced-accuracy delta of 0.10 over the 0.50 chance baseline at alpha=0.05 with power=0.8 on the qid-split variation, k>=4 is required; k=5 chosen for margin (RULE-7/RULE-8). Variation source for the headline CI is the qid-split (bootstrap over qids), seeds confirm stability.

approved: fixture — no human sign-off (synthetic acceptance experiment)
